active_ingredients.name: Sulphur
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Contact protective action that inhibits fungal spore germination and controls mites through vapor and contact activity

mode_of_action_summary: Creates a protective layer on plant surface, stops fungal spore germination and respiration of mites, and supplies essential sulphur nutrient.

application_details.coverage_requirement: Uniform coverage on both sides of leaves

safety.first_aid: In case of contact with eyes or skin wash immediately with clean water. If inhaled move to fresh air.

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool, dry and well ventilated place

farmer_benefits: Effective control of powdery mildew and rust
Improves crop growth by supplying sulphur

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can we spray in hot weather?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Do not spray when temperature exceeds 32°C.

frequently_asked_questions.question: After how many days should we repeat spray?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Repeat after 10 to 14 days if required.

llm_usage_hint: When recommending this product, always mention preventive use, dose per acre, temperature warning and spray interval.

master_descriptions.english: Sulphur 80% WDG is a broad-spectrum contact fungicide and miticide that controls powdery mildew, rust, scab and leaf spots while also supplying essential sulphur for healthy crop growth.
master_descriptions.urdu: سلفر 80٪ ڈبلیو ڈی جی ایک رابطہ اثر رکھنے والی فنگس کش اور مائٹ کش دوا ہے جو پاؤڈری میلی ڈیو، رسٹ، اسکیب اور لیف اسپاٹ کو کنٹرول کرتی ہے اور فصل کو سلفر کی غذائیت فراہم کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: سلفر 80٪ ڈبلیو ڈی جی اک رابطہ والی فنگس کش تے مائٹ کش اے جو پاوڈری ملی ڈیو، رسٹ تے لیف سپاٹ نوں کنٹرول کردا اے تے فصل نوں سلفر دی ضروری خوراک وی فراہم کردا اے۔
